title: Rename device - Renamed, Home screen
scenario: Device name change via Device Settings > General is not reflected on the Home screen after navigating back
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen
Tap on the target Poly device to open Device Settings
Tap on the device's official name field
Enter a new name for the device
Tap Done to confirm the rename
Navigate back to the Home screen
Observe the device name displayed on the Home screen
expected: The device's name on the Home screen is updated to the new name entered.
